kyc.title: Identity verification
kyc.subtitle: To list vehicles and receive payments, we need to verify your identity
kyc.documentsSentDesc: Your request is being reviewed. We will notify you by email.
kyc.pendingVerificationDesc: Upload the required documents to complete verification
kyc.uploadErrorDesc: Could not upload the document. Please try again.
kyc.req1: Documents must be legible and current
kyc.req2: Format: JPG or PNG, maximum 5MB per file
kyc.req3: The selfie must show your face next to your document
kyc.req4: The verification process takes 1-2 business days
kyc.docDescIdDocument: ID card, DNI or passport (front and back)
kyc.docDescSelfie: Photo of yourself holding your ID document
